recommendations.title: Crocodile Dundee II
recommendations.overview: Australian outback expert protects his New York love from gangsters who've followed her down under.

recommendations.title: Wolf Creek 2
recommendations.overview: Lured by the promise of an Australian holiday, backpackers Rutger, Katarina and Paul visit the notorious Wolf Creek Crater.  Their dream Outback adventure soon becomes a horrific reality when they encounter the site's most infamous local, the last ma

recommendations.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Collision Course
recommendations.overview: Steve Irwin, AKA The Crocodile Hunter, has avoided the death-roll and saved a croc from poachers. But what he doesn't know is that the crocodile has swallowed a top secret U.S. satellite beacon, and the poachers are actually American special agents s

recommendations.title: Fantozzi: White Collar Blues
recommendations.overview: A good-natured but unlucky Italian is constantly going on a difficult situations, but never lose his mood.

recommendations.title: Cross the Line
recommendations.overview: A good-natured man has an unexpected deadly confrontation. Instincts kick in to clean up the mess caused in the name of self-defense but does one really get away free after killing someone?

recommendations.title: The Lincoln Lawyer
recommendations.overview: Mick Haller is a charismatic defense attorney who does business out of his Lincoln Continental sedan. Mick spends most of his time defending petty crooks and other bottom-feeders, so it comes as quite a surprise when he lands the case of a lifetime:

recommendations.title: Barry
recommendations.overview: A young Barack Obama forges his identity while dealing with race, divergent cultures and ordinary life as a New York City college student.

recommendations.title: Satan's Little Helper
recommendations.overview: A naïve young boy unknowingly becomes the pawn of a serial killer.

recommendations.title: Road Train
recommendations.overview: A supernatural thriller about a group of teenagers menaced by a driver-less train in the Australian outback.

recommendations.title: Pocketful of Miracles
recommendations.overview: A New York gangster and his girlfriend attempt to turn street beggar Apple Annie into a society lady when the peddler learns her daughter is marrying royalty.
